privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims in task.json are verified. The task requires creating an interactive presentation with 8 slides synthesized at runtime using python-pptx. Slide targets are correctly specified using 0-based indexing: History→Slide 2 (Index 1, 'Our History'), Benefits→Slide 4 (Index 3, 'Employee Benefits'), Policies→Slide 6 (Index 5, 'Company Policies'), with Home button→Slide 1 (Index 0, 'Welcome to Acme Corp'). Start file orientation_kiosk.odp is generated in /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/ and should be saved as orientation_kiosk_interactive.odp. The verifier correctly checks file existence, parses ODP XML content, and validates that shapes with specific button names have proper goto-page interaction events pointing to correct slide indices. All file paths, slide mappings, and verifier logic are internally consistent.
